# Persisted experiment runs (generated by notebooks)
#
# results/
#   baseline/
#     latest_run.txt          -> run id of most recent baseline run
#     runs/
#       <YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS>/
#         summary.json        # metadata + aggregate metrics
#         leaderboard.csv     # per-pattern scores
#         answers.csv         # all Q&A pairs (inspect without re-run)
#         patterns.json       # full pattern configs + rag_params
#         prompts.json        # best-pattern prompt templates
#   pr75/
#     runs/ ...
